query:
SELECT
                c.id              AS "file_id!",
                c.mime            AS "mime!",
                c.size            AS "size!: i64",
                c.sha256          AS "sha256?",
                c.xxh3_64         AS "xxh3_64!",
                c.display_name    AS "file_name!",
                c.kind            AS "kind!"
            FROM node_file_binding b
            JOIN file_asset fa ON fa.id = b.file_asset_id
            JOIN file_content c ON c.id = fa.file_content_id
            WHERE b.node_id = ?1
